summary: Frontend testing of new detail modals (PODetailModal, SaleDetailModal, ExpenseDetailModal). Found and fixed 2 critical bugs where pages were calling undefined functions.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Line 1064, 1070: onUpdated={loadExpenses} - function loadExpenses does not exist. Changed to onUpdated={fetchAll}
Line 1160, 1166: onUpdated={() => loadExpenses()} - function loadExpenses does not exist. Changed to onUpdated={() => fetchAll()}

critical_code_review_comments: React duplicate key warnings in console - multiple components using same key. Not critical but should be reviewed.
HTML structure warning: <span> cannot be child of <tr> - hydration warning
context_for_next_testing_agent: The three new detail modals (PODetailModal, SaleDetailModal, ExpenseDetailModal) are working correctly. Test verified: ExpenseDetailModal opens from Expenses and Accounting pages, PODetailModal opens from Suppliers page and Dashboard, TransactionSearchPage routes to correct modal by type. No sales data was available to test SaleDetailModal, but code structure is correct.

SaleDetailModal.note: No sales data available in test environment to verify modal content
